method_description: Stock-average passenger road fleet dominated by internal-combustion vehicles. Calibrated to aggregate road-energy use rather than only new-vehicle test values.
evidence_summary: Service calibration uses official BITRE passenger-km or tonne-km and official Australian road-energy totals; pathway direction uses Australian EV and road-freight studies.
derivation_method: Hybrid synthesis. Incumbent methods are calibrated to aggregate Australian road energy and freight/passenger task data; transition methods reflect Australian drivetrain efficiency and cost evidence with smoothed milestone trajectories.
review_notes: 2025 coefficient is chosen so that passenger-road and freight-road incumbent methods jointly reproduce official road transport energy within about 0.2% when using BITRE service volumes.

method_description: Passenger road fleet with widespread hybridisation and improved efficiency but continued reliance on liquid fuels.
evidence_summary: Service calibration uses official BITRE passenger-km or tonne-km and official Australian road-energy totals; pathway direction uses Australian EV and road-freight studies.
derivation_method: Hybrid synthesis. Incumbent methods are calibrated to aggregate Australian road energy and freight/passenger task data; transition methods reflect Australian drivetrain efficiency and cost evidence with smoothed milestone trajectories.
review_notes: Useful transitional abatement method when BEV uptake is constrained or the model values liquid-fuel compatibility.

method_description: Predominantly battery-electric passenger road service with lower final energy demand and zero direct tailpipe emissions.
evidence_summary: Service calibration uses official BITRE passenger-km or tonne-km and official Australian road-energy totals; pathway direction uses Australian EV and road-freight studies.
derivation_method: Hybrid synthesis. Incumbent methods are calibrated to aggregate Australian road energy and freight/passenger task data; transition methods reflect Australian drivetrain efficiency and cost evidence with smoothed milestone trajectories.
review_notes: Electricity-use coefficient is a representative fleet-average service coefficient rather than a specific model-year vehicle rating.
